questions.question_text: What is the difference between crime, deviance, sin and vice? Do you believe that crime is one of the major social problems of Pakistani society? Discuss.
What is the meaning of Anomie? Discuss Robert Merton theory of Anomie in detail.
Define the term juvenile delinquency. Write a note on the history of juvenile justice system and role of juvenile court in reducing juvenile delinquency.

In Pakistan, the creation of police force is a colonial legacy. In which circumstances independent police force was established in the pre-independence era. What major changes have been occurred in the police department in Pakistan?
What are the legal and ethical guidelines for investigating gender-based crimes? Explain your answer with the help of suitable examples.
What is meant by forensic criminal investigation? What are the hurdles in streamlining the forensic criminal investigation in Pakistan?
What is the role of community policing in curtailing the problem of crime in Pakistan?
Discuss the role of FIA in controlling organized crimes in Pakistan.
